posts.title: How to write (sick) loops in Claude Code
posts.description: Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, says his job is now to write loops that prompt Claude autonomously. Here is how to do it, from simple CI watching to a full multi-model agent loop that clones a website using a browser.
posts.author: James Daniel Whitford
